title: Effortless
description: Effortless is a carefully curated Minecraft Fabric and Forge modpack focused on enhancing your gaming experience.
body:
**Minecraft version 1.20.5+ requires Java 21**

>Effortless is a carefully curated Minecraft Fabric and Forge modpack focused on enhancing your gaming experience. It includes performance optimization mods for a smoother game, along with quality-of-life improvements to make gameplay easier and more enjoyable. Additionally, it features a selection of mods that lightly enhance the experience on RP servers. With Effortless, you get a balanced and immersive Minecraft adventure with just the right amount of customization and efficiency.
